checks.name: .gitignore 檔案存在
checks.fix_suggestion: 建立 .gitignore，參考 GitHub 模板或本技能的推薦清單

checks.name: .gitignore 涵蓋 .env
checks.fix_suggestion: 在 .gitignore 中加入 `.env`

checks.name: .gitignore 涵蓋 *.db / *.sqlite
checks.fix_suggestion: 在 .gitignore 中加入 `*.db` 和 `*.sqlite`

checks.name: .gitignore 涵蓋 __pycache__
checks.fix_suggestion: 在 .gitignore 中加入 `__pycache__/`

checks.name: .gitignore 涵蓋 *.zip / *.tar.gz
checks.fix_suggestion: 在 .gitignore 中加入 `*.zip`、`*.tar.gz`

checks.name: .gitignore 涵蓋 node_modules
checks.fix_suggestion: 在 .gitignore 中加入 `node_modules/`

checks.name: .gitignore 涵蓋 *.log
checks.fix_suggestion: 在 .gitignore 中加入 `*.log`

checks.name: .gitignore 檔案是否損毀
checks.check_command: lines=$(wc -l < .gitignore 2>/dev/null); if [ "$lines" -gt 300 ]; then echo CORRUPTED:$lines; else echo OK:$lines; fi
checks.description: .gitignore 超過 300 行或內容明顯非 gitignore 格式視為損毀
checks.fix_suggestion: 重建 .gitignore

checks.name: 檢查 .env 是否已被 commit
checks.check_command: git ls-files 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.env$' | grep -v '\.example$' | grep -v '\.sample$' || echo PASS
checks.fix_suggestion: `git rm --cached .env`，加入 .gitignore，重新 commit

checks.name: 檢查 *.db / *.sqlite 是否已被 commit
checks.fix_suggestion: `git rm --cached *.db`，加入 .gitignore，重新 commit

checks.name: .gitignore 涵蓋 .checkpoints/
checks.fix_suggestion: 在 .gitignore 中加入 `.checkpoints/`（agent 檢查點目錄不該被版本控制）

checks.name: API Key 硬編碼
checks.fix_suggestion: 改用環境變數：`os.environ.get('API_KEY')` 或 `process.env.API_KEY`

checks.name: 密碼硬編碼
checks.fix_suggestion: 改用環境變數或 secret manager

checks.name: Flask/Django secret_key 硬編碼
checks.fix_suggestion: 改用 `os.environ.get('FLASK_SECRET_KEY', 'dev-fallback')`

checks.name: 非標準 localhost port 硬編碼
checks.fix_suggestion: 改用 config 檔或環境變數管理 service URL

checks.name: 使用者映射表硬編碼
checks.fix_suggestion: 移到外部 config.json 或資料庫

checks.name: 多個 requirements.txt
checks.check_command: count=$(find . -name 'requirements*.txt' -not -path './.git/*' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -not -path '*/venv/*' 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ "$count" -gt 1 ]; then echo DUPLICATE:$count; else echo OK:$count; fi
checks.fix_suggestion: 統整為單一 requirements.txt 或改用 pyproject.toml

checks.name: pyproject.toml 與 requirements.txt 並存
checks.check_command: test -f pyproject.toml && test -f requirements.txt && echo CONFLICT || echo OK
checks.fix_suggestion: 選擇一套依賴管理系統：Poetry/pip-tools 或純 pip

checks.name: 多個 config 檔案散落
checks.check_command: count=$(find . -name '*config*.py' -o -name '*config*.json' -o -name '*_config.*' 2>/dev/null | grep -v '.git/' | grep -v 'node_modules/' | grep -v 'venv/' | grep -v '__pycache__/' | wc -l); if [ "$count" -gt 2 ]; then echo SCATTERED:$count; else echo OK:$count; fi
checks.fix_suggestion: 合併為統一 config 模組或使用階層式 config/

checks.name: ZIP/tar.gz 壓縮檔被 commit
checks.fix_suggestion: `git rm --cached`，加入 .gitignore，改用 Git LFS 或外部儲存

checks.name: __pycache__ 被 commit
checks.fix_suggestion: `git rm -r --cached **/__pycache__/`，確保 .gitignore 有 `__pycache__/`

checks.name: 日誌檔被 commit
checks.fix_suggestion: `git rm --cached`，加入 .gitignore

checks.name: 遊戲存檔 / 資料匯出被 commit
checks.fix_suggestion: `git rm --cached`，加入 .gitignore

checks.name: node_modules 被 commit
checks.fix_suggestion: `git rm -r --cached node_modules/`，加入 .gitignore

checks.name: .env.sh 被 commit
checks.fix_suggestion: `git rm --cached .env.sh`，改名為 .env.sh.example，加入 .gitignore

checks.name: 單一 commit 缺乏開發歷史
checks.check_command: count=$(git log --oneline 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ "$count" -eq 1 ]; then echo SINGLE_COMMIT; else echo OK:$count; fi
checks.fix_suggestion: 非緊急；之後請拆分為邏輯獨立的多個 commit

checks.name: Commit message 不含語意化前綴
checks.check_command: git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null | grep -vE ' (feat|fix|docs|style|refactor|test|chore|ci|build|perf|revert)[:(]' | head -3 || echo OK
checks.fix_suggestion: 使用語意化 commit：feat:/fix:/docs:/chore: 等

checks.name: 大量二進位檔被 commit
checks.check_command: count=$(git ls-files 2>/dev/null | grep -iE '\.(png|jpg|jpeg|gif|ico|exe|dll|so|dylib|bin|dat|pkl|pt|pth|h5|pb|tflite|onnx|zip|tar\.gz|7z|rar)$' | wc -l); if [ "$count" -gt 10 ]; then echo BINARY_HEAVY:$count; else echo OK:$count; fi
checks.fix_suggestion: 使用 Git LFS 管理大型二進位檔

checks.name: Git remote URL 含 token
checks.fix_suggestion: 改用 SSH remote：`git remote set-url origin git@github.com:user/repo.git`

checks.name: GitHub Personal Access Token (classic + fine-grained)
checks.fix_suggestion: 立即撤銷此 token（GitHub Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens），改用環境變數或 gh CLI

checks.name: SSH 私鑰
checks.fix_suggestion: 立即從 git 歷史中移除，撤銷受影響的 SSH key

checks.name: AWS Access Key
checks.fix_suggestion: 立即在 AWS IAM 中撤銷此 key，改用 IAM Role 或環境變數

checks.name: OpenAI / Anthropic API Key
checks.fix_suggestion: 立即在 API provider 後台撤銷此 key，改用環境變數

checks.name: 資料庫連線字串含密碼
checks.fix_suggestion: 改用環境變數 `DATABASE_URL`，不要在 URL 中嵌入密碼

checks.name: curl 命令含 Authorization token
checks.fix_suggestion: 永遠使用 gh CLI 取代裸 curl 呼叫 GitHub API；若必須用 curl，透過 stdin 或環境變數傳遞 token，避免 token 出現在命令列歷史中

checks.name: HTML img 缺少 alt 屬性
checks.regex: N/A（使用 Python HTMLParser 結構化解析）
checks.fix_suggestion: 加入 alt="描述性文字" 屬性；純裝飾性圖片可用 alt="" 並加 role="presentation"（WCAG 合規）

checks.name: Dockerfile 使用 root 使用者或未指定 USER
checks.check_command: test -f Dockerfile && (grep -qiE '^USER root|^USER 0' Dockerfile 2>/dev/null && echo ROOT_USER || (grep -q '^USER ' Dockerfile 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo NO_USER_SPECIFIED)) || echo NO_DOCKERFILE
checks.fix_suggestion: 加入 RUN useradd --no-create-home --shell /bin/false appuser 並在 Dockerfile 末指定 USER appuser；未指定 USER 與 USER root 同等風險——容器預設以 root 執行

checks.name: 有 Dockerfile 但缺少 .dockerignore
checks.check_command: test -f Dockerfile && (test -f .dockerignore && echo PASS || echo MISSING) || echo NO_DOCKERFILE
checks.fix_suggestion: 建立 .dockerignore，至少排除 .git/、node_modules/、__pycache__/、*.log、.env*
